phases.title: Foundation Phase
phases.purpose: Mind reset before structured market observation.
modules: Fast vs Slow Thinking in Markets

phases.title: Context Alignment Phase
phases.purpose: Understanding regime, volatility, liquidity, and narrative structure.

phases.title: Bias Exposure Phase
phases.purpose: Understanding recurring emotional and cognitive distortions.

phases.title: Process & Discipline Phase
phases.purpose: Turning awareness into structured decision behavior.

phases.title: Capstone
phases.purpose: Integrated synthesis across structure, bias, and discipline.

moduleCards.title: Market is Probability, Not Certainty
moduleCards.summary: Resets the expectation that markets should feel certain before action.

moduleCards.title: Fast vs Slow Thinking in Markets
moduleCards.summary: Explains how urgency and volatility accelerate poor cognitive decisions.

moduleCards.title: Regime Thinking
moduleCards.summary: Frames market behavior through changing environment rather than fixed assumptions.

moduleCards.title: FOMO & Social Contagion
moduleCards.summary: Shows how crowd emotion distorts decision quality.

moduleCards.title: Defining Risk Before Action
moduleCards.summary: Places risk definition ahead of action and emotional reaction.

moduleCards.title: Structural vs Emotional Market Moves
moduleCards.summary: Final integration layer for broader decision intelligence.

tests.rule: Max 3 attempts per 24 hours in later production phases.
tests.currentMVP: Phase 6 provides a structured shell and demo stage test card only.

certification.title: Decision Intelligence Practitioner
certification.note: Final certificate will unlock only after full academy completion in later phases.
